citation.description: _is_dependency_path checked BEFORE root containment; an origin under site-packages/.venv/venv classifies as third-party/stdlib even when nested inside repo root.

criteria.criterion: The origin classifier treats module origins under the active environment's site-packages as third-party/stdlib even when that directory is inside the repo root.

citation.description: test_resolve_symbol_repo_nested_venv_is_third_party monkeypatches origin=<root>/.venv/lib/py/site-packages/acme/__init__.py and asserts third-party/stdlib in output, repo-local not in output.

criteria.criterion: A unit test pins the venv-inside-repo case (monkeypatched origin path under repo_root/.venv/.../site-packages classified third-party).
